title: Brand Associate
description:
McKinsey & Company is a leading global management consulting firm advising C-suite executives at Fortune 500 companies.

We're seeking a Brand Associate to join our Management Consulting team in Research Triangle Park. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Support brand strategy and marketing initiatives
Analyze brand performance metrics and market research data
Develop marketing materials and communication content
Coordinate brand compliance and messaging across channels
Support client engagement and relationship management
Assist with brand positioning and competitive differentiation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years in brand management, marketing, or consulting

benefits: Onsite work in Research Triangle Park
